title: Reverse-polarity protection + 3.3 V rail
prompt: My STM32F103 board is powered from an external 5 V input that people sometimes plug in backwards. Add reverse-polarity protection with a series diode in the input path, then a 3.3 V regulator after it, and power the STM32 from the 3.3 V rail. For the bench check apply a correct 5 V input and confirm the rail regulates.
